text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a sudden turn of events, Umamusume from
around the world will be arriving for an
impromptu cultural exchange festival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While I'm decorating the campus...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The hallway decorations seem to be coming along
nicely. I suppose this display case is the one
dedicated to the academy's history.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It features a variety of memorabilia lent to us by
the director. I ask that everyone here handles it
with care.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Eeek!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Is everything okay? Are you hurt?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, I'm okay, but... I just left a dent in the
director's prized wooden sculpture!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmm... It's a sculpture of an Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll take responsibility for this. Continue with your
tasks—I'll go and tell the director.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm, looking at these dimensions, a piste should
be within reason. This should allow us to hold
proper duels.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Bravo! If it will instill great excitement, then
absolutely!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
There you are, Director Akikawa. And you too,
President.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Why yes! We were just in discussions about the
fencing show, one of the events scheduled for the
cultural exchange festival!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
My apologies for interrupting, but I have
something to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your wooden sculpture has been damaged due to
my poor leadership. I am truly sorry.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: What a shame! A true shame, indeed! However...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
All things are transient. Perhaps its time had
come...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
As such, a suggestion! Assume the role of Rudolf's
training partner! If you emerge victorious, then I
shall overlook this incident!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Would you do me the honor, Air Groove? I
cannot find anyone to spar with me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah, a fencing partner? If you would have me as
your partner, then I would be delighted to.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Excellent! Then, let us begin! Rassemblez, saluez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Come, and show me what you're made of. May
the talents of your blade bloom forth with pride!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This may be a mere mock duel, but as the proud
Empress, I know not of defeat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a fierce exchange of offensive and
defensive blows, Air Groove racks up enough
points and wins!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Your defense was impenetrable. The
Empress of our fair academy is as swift as a bolt
of lightning.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your humility speaks volumes. I would have stood
no chance if you dueled in earnest.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
A decisive win! I expected no less of you, Air
Groove. Very well, I shall overlook the sculpture
incident!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a fierce exchange of offensive and
defensive blows, Symboli Rudolf racks up enough
points and wins!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your skills were far superior to mine. I
concede—you are worthy to be heralded as the
Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In reality, the difference was paper thin. I became
quite stubborn by the end of our match.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't convinced I could win with the ease of an
emperor against your prowess.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
A close duel! Also, an excellent and rare one! I
shall acknowledge your skills and overlook the
sculpture incident!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And now, a question! What kind of wood was the
sculpture carved from?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Perhaps... oak?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Correct! And that Umamusume sculpture...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Was modeled on the illustrious, extremely
popular Queen who conquered the Japanese
Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: The Queen...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I implore you to continue your efforts. May they
truly befit that of royalty!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I am sincerely grateful for the immense leniency
you have shown.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Now, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove leaves with a bow, swiftly returning to
oversee the event preparations.
